retry_reason: The refcount decrement always executes and cannot fail; retrying would cause a double-put, leading to use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on the drm_device stored in the VMA's private data. It is typically called as the VMA close operation (vm_ops->close) to drop the reference obtained when the VMA was opened. After this call, the caller must not use the drm_device pointer because the reference has been released and the device may be freed when the last reference is dropped. No further put should be called on the same device from this path.
